# Clippy — Real-time Twitch Stream Intelligence API
> Detects chat spikes, classifies moments with AI, and auto-clips highlights. Pay-per-use via MPP.

Base URL: https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app

## Free Endpoints (no payment needed)

- GET /api — Service info, all endpoints with prices
- GET /health — Status: connected, channel count, msg/s
- GET /trending — Top 10 channels by chat burst rate
- GET /alerts — SSE stream of real-time spike events. Query: ?channel=name
- GET /moments/:id — Get a specific captured moment by ID
- GET /moments/latest/:channel — Most recent moment for a channel

## Paid Endpoints (MPP charge per request)

- POST /trending ($0.001) — Full trending list with custom limit. Body: {"limit": 20}
- POST /channel ($0.001) — Stats for one channel. Body: {"channel": "xqc"}
- POST /spikes ($0.002) — All channels currently spiking with VOD links. Body: {"withinMinutes": 5}
- POST /summarize ($0.01) — LLM-powered summary of channel chat. Body: {"channel": "xqc"}
- POST /moments ($0.001) — List captured spike moments. Body: {"channel": "xqc", "limit": 20}

## Session Endpoint (MPP session, pay per spike)

- POST /watch/:channel ($0.03/spike) — SSE stream with LLM-classified spikes + auto-clipping. Opens payment channel, charges per spike event.

## Watchlist (controls auto-clipping)

- POST /watch-clip/:channel — Add channel to auto-clip watchlist
- DELETE /watch-clip/:channel — Remove channel from watchlist
- GET /watch-clip — List watched channels

## How to use with tempo CLI

```bash
# Install tempo
curl -fsSL https://tempo.xyz/install.sh | sh
tempo wallet login

# Browse trending (free)
tempo request https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/trending

# Get channel stats (pays $0.001)
tempo request -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"channel": "jynxzi"}' \
  https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/channel

# Listen for spikes on any channel (free SSE)
curl -N https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/alerts?channel=jynxzi

# Get latest moment with AI mood + clip
tempo request https://stream-intel-production.up.railway.app/moments/latest/jynxzi
```

## Spike Event Format

```json
{
  "channel": "jynxzi",
  "viewers": 18500,
  "burst": 14.2,
  "baseline": 7.1,
  "jumpPercent": 107,
  "vibe": "funny",
  "vibeIntensity": 42,
  "vodTimestamp": "2h19m19s",
  "vodUrl": "https://www.twitch.tv/videos/2730908290?t=2h19m19s"
}
```

## Moment Format (after LLM classification)

```json
{
  "id": 890,
  "channel": "jynxzi",
  "jumpPercent": 107,
  "mood": "funny",
  "description": "Chat spammed SON after streamer showed off their skinny arms",
  "clipUrl": "https://clips.twitch.tv/WonderfulDifficultDragonfruitBIRB-...",
  "vodUrl": "https://www.twitch.tv/videos/2730908290?t=2h19m19s",
  "chatSnapshot": ["user1: LOL", "user2: SON", "..."]
}
```

## Payment

All paid endpoints use Tempo MPP (https://tempo.xyz). Agents pay with USDC on Tempo chain. No API keys needed.

- Charge: one transaction per request
- Session: deposit into escrow, pay per event via off-chain vouchers, unused deposit refunded on close

Wallet: 0xfaad4f22fc6259646c8925203a04020e5458da6d
Currency: USDC (0x20c000000000000000000000b9537d11c60e8b50)
